release_notes:
v23.05.6 The Ultimate Stability & QA Patch:
- Standalone .exe is now 100% crash-proof with C++ memory armor and strict thread kill-switches.
- Added dynamic 'Empty XML/JSON Generated' status indicator directly to the canvas.
- Upgraded SPACEBAR to act as an 'Instant Empty Verify' shortcut for images with no labels.
- Added rapid-fire auto-delete capability (Hold Delete to machine-gun shapes).
- Added permanent, dynamically-sliding ID numbers to the outside edges of shapes.
- Upgraded shape labels with Constant Screen Scaling (zoom-proof text).
